Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\wind\\Desktop\\Django_docs\\e-commerce_Project_octobre2025\\matstore" && ../myenv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import os, sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'.'\); os.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE']='config.settings'
import django; django.setup\(\)
from django.test import RequestFactory
from django.contrib.admin.sites import AdminSite
from shop.admin import CarrierAdmin
from shop.models.Carrier import Carrier
site = AdminSite\(\)
ma = CarrierAdmin\(Carrier, site\)
from django.contrib.auth.models import User
rf = RequestFactory\(\)
req = rf.get\('/admin/shop/carrier/'\)
req.user = User\(is_staff=True, is_superuser=True\)
try:
    resp = ma.changeform_view\(req\)
    print\('OK'\)
except Exception as e:
    import traceback; traceback.print_exc\(\)
" 2>&1)
